Sexually Transmitted Infections Treatment Guidelines, 2021 
Error processing SSI file 
Congenital Syphilis 
Print 
Minus 
Related Pages 
The rate of reported congenital syphilis in the United States has increased dramatically since 2012. During 2019, a total of 1,870 cases of congenital syphilis were reported, including 94 stillbirths and 34 infant deaths ( 141 ). The 2019 national rate of 48.5 cases per 100,000 live births represents a 41% increase relative to 2018 (34.3 cases per 100,000 live births) and a 477% increase relative to 2012 (8.4 cases per 100,000 live births).
